subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached the Divine Throne and been favored with the gaze of the Lord of Names, and through sheer grace its beginning hath been adorned with exalted verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت لدی العرش حاضر و بلحاظ مالک اسماء فائز و محض فضل راس آن را بایات منیعه
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @law of obligatory prayer, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @chastisement and requital
